title: Memo field encryption (within MLS payload)
description: ZIP-302 memo field (512 bytes) on each transaction. For nie payments, populate memo with the session_id UUID so the payee can match the tx to a session even if app state is lost. Memo is visible to anyone with the IVK — it is NOT extra encryption, just structured data in the shielded memo field.
close_reason: Design documented in CLAUDE.md Wallet Security section and PaymentSession.id field + messages.rs comments; actual memo write happens in nie-wallet transaction builder (Phase 2)
